title: Year in Sport
subtitle: Your private, ownable recap — computed from your own archive, no account, no cloud.
rationale: The annual recap was a free staple for roughly a decade. In December 2025 both major platforms moved it behind a subscription within days of each other, drawing wide criticism. A recap computed locally from data you already own restores something that used to be free — and the share artifact is a self-contained file anyone can open with no login.

sources.title: Strava Puts Popular 'Year in Sport' Recap Behind an $80 Paywall (free since 2016)
Garmin locks year-in-review (Rundown) behind a subscription paywall
Strava follows Garmin in locking its Year in Sport behind a paywall
Dear Strava, we have a paywall problem that's gone a step too far
